metadata.notes: Generated from Section 25 of the Definitive Parity Audit. Gap IDs reference audit sections for full context. GAP-AUDIO pipeline batch 2026-03-19: Ported entire percussion/audio import pipeline (8 gaps, ~3900 LOC). GAP-INFRA-1 ExternalProcessRunner (process_runner.rs). GAP-AUDIO-1 PercussionAnalysisModels (percussion_analysis.rs + percussion_settings.rs + percussion_binding.rs in manifold-core). GAP-AUDIO-2 PercussionAnalysisParser (percussion_parser.rs). GAP-AUDIO-6 PercussionPipelineBackendResolver (percussion_backend.rs). GAP-AUDIO-3 PercussionTimelinePlanner + PercussionImportService (percussion_planner.rs + percussion_import.rs). GAP-AUDIO-5 MidiFileParser + MidiImportService (midi_parser.rs + midi_import.rs). GAP-AUDIO-4 PercussionImportOrchestrator (percussion_orchestrator.rs). GAP-AUDIO-8 PercussionAlignmentService (percussion_alignment.rs). All in manifold-playback except core types.

gaps.title: Port DriverController + ParameterDriverManager + EnvelopeEvaluator (modulation pipeline)
gaps.notes: Full modulation pipeline: reset_all_effectives, evaluate_all_drivers (LFO), evaluate_all_envelopes (ADSR), evaluate_gen_param_envelopes. Wired into tick_playing + tick_non_playing.

gaps.title: Port PlaybackController orchestration (Update loop)
gaps.notes: Tick loop orchestration restructured to match Unity PlaybackController.Update() exactly. All ported-but-unwired methods now called in correct order: check_preparing_clips, activate_due_pending_launches, update_active_clip_playback_rates, check_custom_loop_boundaries, correct_video_drift (throttled), filter_ready_clips (replaces build_ready_clips_list), compute_prewarm_candidates. Added fields: video_sync_interval, is_export_mode, export_fixed_dt, on_time_changed callback. Remaining stubs: external beat derivation from Link/MidiClock (blocked by GAP-PLAY-9), tempo recording/resolution (TempoRecorder not yet ported), perf stats collection (GAP-DIAG-1).

gaps.title: Wire GeneratorRenderer as ClipRenderer trait impl
gaps.notes: GeneratorRenderer implements ClipRenderer. Engine owns it via replace_renderer. App uses downcast for GPU ops.

gaps.title: Port ClipLauncher (MIDI to clip triggering)
gaps.notes: ClipLauncher ported: HandleNoteOn/Off, random clip selection, in-point randomization, 5ms stale NoteOff guard, channel filtering, auto-commit on collision, deterministic seed. All constants exact match.

gaps.title: Port MidiInputController (MIDI device to ClipLauncher routing)
gaps.notes: MidiInputController.cs (526 lines). Would use midir crate.

gaps.title: Wire live_slots in sync_clips_to_time
gaps.notes: live_slots now passed from LiveClipManager to scheduler.compute_sync().

gaps.title: Add 5ms NoteOn/NoteOff timing guard
gaps.notes: 5ms time guard + sequence guard in commit_live_clip(). Creation timestamps tracked per slot.

gaps.title: Fix reset_effectives() to only reset driven params
gaps.notes: Fixed: GeneratorParamState::reset_effectives() now resets only params with active drivers/envelopes, matching Unity.

gaps.title: Port PlaybackEngine clip time/rate methods
gaps.notes: Ported: 15 clip time/rate methods (GetClipPlaybackRate, ResolveClipRecordedBpm, ComputeVideoTime, etc.), 6 clip maintenance methods (CheckPreparingClips, CheckCustomLoopBoundaries, CorrectVideoDrift, UpdateActiveClipPlaybackRates, SeekActiveClips, FilterReadyClips with ShouldExcludeRecentlyStarted), prewarm system (ComputePrewarmCandidates + 9 constants), PrewarmCandidate struct. Fixed video_time.rs to match Unity exactly (Max(0,.) clamps, 0.01 threshold, mediaLength-inPoint). Added beat_to_seconds_immut for immutable tempo conversion.

gaps.title: Implement video file drag-and-drop
gaps.notes: All video extensions log a message and do nothing. No clip creation, no library import.

gaps.title: Port ProjectArchive.Save() — V2 ZIP format
gaps.notes: Full V2 archive: manifest.rs (ProjectManifest, SnapshotEntry, ProjectInfo), archive.rs (save/load/revert/prune/label/rebuild), saver.rs rewritten to V2. SHA-256 dedup, gzip history, atomic save, PathResolver integration.

gaps.title: Add post-load validation pipeline
gaps.notes: Ported 5 of 6 post-load steps: (1) on_after_deserialize (was present), (2) BPM sync with clamp 20-300, (3) DurationMode migration (force NoteOff), (4) Project.validate() structural check, (5) VideoLibrary.validate_clips() missing file detection, (6) Project.purge_orphaned_references() cascading cleanup. Step 3 (PathResolver.ResolveAll) deferred — requires GAP-CORE-7. Added has_clip() to VideoLibrary, ValidationResult struct.

gaps.title: Fix FluidSimulation3D (19 issues per FLUID_SIM_AUDIT.md)
gaps.notes: Fixed 10 divergences: DIFF-14 gradient force 64x too strong (now * 0.5 integer voxel space), DIFF-2 fluid_simulate_3d.wgsl full rewrite (noise at time2*0.1/pos*2, anti-clump, container SDF, integration, flatten, color), DIFF-9 blur radius formula corrected (base=round(feather), scaled=max(1,round(base*res/640))), DIFF-1 cam_tilt converted to cam_tilt*PI*0.5, DIFF-8 ref_axis time scale ctx.Time*0.3, DIFF-3 3D scatter energy removed particle_size factor, DIFF-11 ortho projection uses fract() toroidal wrap, DIFF-12 SeedUniforms trigger_count field added, DIFF-26 2D blur pass removed, DIFF-15 volume amortization toggle parity + force on snap frames.

gaps.title: Implement IParamSource / IEffectContainer traits
gaps.notes: EffectContainer trait + impls for TimelineClip/Layer/ProjectSettings. ParamSource trait + impl for EffectInstance. SelectionRegionTarget trait. All match Unity interfaces.

gaps.title: Add property clamping (systematic)
gaps.notes: All clamped setters added: ProjectSettings (bpm, output dims, frame_rate, time_sig, master_opacity, pool_size, max_layers, recording_layer, osc_port), Layer (opacity, midi_note, midi_channel), TimelineClip (scale, loop_duration_beats). All clamp ranges match Unity exactly.

gaps.title: Port 5 critical missing panels
gaps.notes: Assessment: OverviewStripPanel already inline in viewport.rs (clip miniatures, viewport indicator, playhead — missing push-update node IDs and export range markers). BrowserPopupPanel has functional dropdown fallback in ui_root.rs (missing full grid/category/search UI). ClipInspector/LayerInspector/MasterInspector have chrome panels (clip_chrome.rs 561L, layer_chrome.rs 345L, master_chrome.rs 403L) + inspector.rs orchestration (1179L) — missing data binding, undo snapshots, version-gated sync, multi-layer support. Remaining: BrowserPopup full grid, inspector data binding/undo wiring.

gaps.title: Complete EditingService orchestration methods
gaps.notes: All EditingService orchestration methods complete. 8 methods in editing crate + 4 UI-coupled methods in app layer: select_region_to (ui_bridge.rs select_region_to_with_engine), on_clip_selected (inspector sync via UIBridge), delete_selected_layers (input_host.rs), group_selected_layers (input_host.rs). All wired into keyboard shortcuts (Delete, Cmd+G) and Shift+Click selection.

gaps.title: Port PathResolver
gaps.notes: Full port: PathResolver (resolve_all, store_relative_paths, try_resolve, try_resolve_directory, make_relative, build_search_dirs) + PathResolutionResult. Integrated into loader (V1+V2) and saver.

gaps.title: Consolidate ProjectIOService as unit
gaps.notes: ProjectIOService consolidated as project_io.rs (470 lines). All project lifecycle (new, open, open recent, save, save as) + file drop processing (video, MIDI, project files) ported as unit. Application delegates via thin wrappers + ProjectIOAction return type (replaces IProjectIOHost callback). DroppedFile handler now routes video/MIDI through service.

gaps.title: Port 6 simple missing effects
gaps.notes: EdgeGlow, Infrared, VoronoiPrism ported. Remaining: GradientMap, Surveillance, Redaction (removed from dropdown, not yet implemented).

gaps.title: Fix project_4d for Tesseract/Duocylinder
gaps.notes: Tier 3 Phase 7A: Two-stage projection (4D→3D→2D), raw pz depth. Phase 8A-8B: removed double-scale. Phase 11A-11B: WireframeZoo vertex normalization + projected_z fix.

gaps.title: Fix FluidSim2D (particle cap, texture formats, rounding)
gaps.notes: Tier 3 Phase 10A-10D: FluidSim density R32Float, vector Rg32Float, 8M particle cap. FluidSim3D density R16Float, 8M cap. Mycelium trail R32Float.

gaps.title: Port ExternalProcessRunner (std::process::Command)
gaps.notes: Port of ExternalProcessRunner using std::process::Command + std::thread + mpsc channels. IExternalProcessRunner trait + ProcessRunnerImpl + ProcessHandle (poll-based). IL2CPP popen path dropped (not needed in Rust). Includes argument quoting helpers + tests.

gaps.title: Port PercussionAnalysisModels (all data types)
gaps.notes: Full port: PercussionTriggerType (11 variants), PercussionEvent, PercussionBeatGrid (with TryMapSecondsToBeat, EnsureValid), PercussionAnalysisData (EnergyAtBeat, EnsureValid), PercussionClipBinding, PercussionImportOptions, PercussionClipPlacement, PercussionPlacementPlan. Also: BeatTimeConverter trait + ProjectBeatTimeConverter, PercussionClipReprojectionPlanner. PercussionPipelineSettings (all 12 nested setting structs with exact defaults). PercussionBindingResolver trait + ProjectPercussionBindingResolver. PercussionImportOptionsFactory.

gaps.title: Port PercussionAnalysisParser (JSON parsing)
gaps.notes: Full port: IPercussionAnalysisParser trait + JsonPercussionAnalysisParser. All DTOs (RootDto, EventDto, BeatGridDto, EnergyEnvelopeDto). ParseTriggerType with every alias (exact + contains fallbacks). NormalizeRoot, FirstNonEmpty, FirstFiniteNonNegative. MIDI velocity normalization (>1 && <=127 → /127). Beat grid parsing with priority chain.

gaps.title: Port PercussionTimelinePlanner + PercussionImportService
gaps.notes: PercussionTimelinePlanner: full planning pipeline (seconds→beats, quantization, confidence gating, energy gate, dedup via compose_quantized_slot_key, duration clamping 0.0625-32.0). PercussionImportService: clip placement on timeline, BPM auto-apply (PercussionBpmDecision), layer auto-creation, overlap enforcement, ImportedPercussionClipPlacement record creation, PercussionImportState assembly.

gaps.title: Port PercussionImportOrchestrator (central orchestration)
gaps.notes: 1,501 lines. Port complete: state machine (IEnumerator -> poll-based tick()), pipeline invocation, progress parser (PercussionPipelineProgressParser), JSON parsing, clip placement, BPM auto-apply, stem path resolution, SetImportedAudioCommand. ProjectPercussionBindingResolver refactored to own its data (no lifetime param) to resolve &mut Project aliasing. PercussionTimelinePlanner updated to 'a lifetime on trait bounds.

gaps.title: Port MidiFileParser + MidiImportService
gaps.notes: MidiFileParser: pure Rust SMF parser (format 0+1), MThd/MTrk chunks, variable-length quantity, running status, tempo map, tick-to-seconds, NoteOn/NoteOff pairing, MIN_NOTE_DURATION_BEATS=1/128. MidiImportService: timeline clip creation, layer auto-create, generator/video resolution, BasicShapesSnap fallback, overlap trimming, composite AddClipCommand with undo.

gaps.title: Port PercussionPipelineBackendResolver
gaps.notes: Full port: PercussionPipelineBackendType enum, PercussionPipelineInvocation struct, PercussionPipelineBackendResolver with all 4 Build* entry points. Binary resolution (Python, ffmpeg, demucs) with exact path candidate lists. CLI argument building with all settings params. Demucs cache arguments. Platform conditionals (macOS mps/cpu). Temp config path generation.

gaps.title: Port ImportedAudioSyncController (basic audio playback)
gaps.notes: Full port using kira 0.9 (StaticSoundData + AudioManager). All methods translated: load_audio, update_sync (3-state Playing/Paused/Stopped), set_start_beat, get_duration_beats, get_end_beat, try_get_source_seconds_at_playhead, reset_audio. ffprobe encoder delay probing via std::process::Command. Constants match Unity exactly (0.06, 0.20, 0.5). Wired into app tick loop (after engine.tick) and project load (reads PercussionImportState.audio_path). kira stop() is permanent so Stopped state uses pause()+seek_to(0) — same logical behavior.

gaps.title: Port StemAudioController (4-stem DAW playback)
gaps.notes: 4-stem Demucs playback (drums, bass, other, vocals) with per-stem mute/solo. Depends on GAP-AUDIO-7a for base audio sync. Split from original GAP-AUDIO-7.

gaps.title: Port PercussionAlignmentService
gaps.notes: Full port: PercussionAlignmentService (downbeat calibration, nudge, reset, reprojection). NudgePercussionAlignmentCommand + ResetPercussionAlignmentCommand (ICommand impls with undo). PercussionAlignmentSnapshot for state save/restore. Added is_valid() + set_alignment_state() to ImportedPercussionClipPlacement. Added Project accessor methods for percussion clip placements.

gaps.title: Port waveform UI (WaveformRenderer + lanes)
gaps.notes: 1,870 lines across 8 files. Ported all 7 Unity files: WaveformRenderer (MIP chain + spectral coloring), ImportedAudioWaveformLane (bitmap panel + scrub/drag handlers), StemWaveformLane + StemLaneGroup (4-stem lanes with mute/solo), DriverWaveformIcons (procedural SDF), WaveformLaneScrollForwarder, ImportedAudioWaveformScrubHandler, ImportedAudioWaveformDragHandler. Adapted from Unity tile-based rendering to Rust bitmap pixel-buffer painting. 16 unit tests. Full GPU pipeline: symphonia PCM decoder → MIP chain → spectral coloring → pixel buffer → wgpu texture upload → render pass. Wired into UIRoot, UIBridge, ScreenLayout. track_header_height() invariant established. Stem audio playback stubbed (needs GAP-AUDIO-7b).

gaps.title: Port 4 stateful effects (InfiniteZoom, Datamosh, SlitScan, Corruption)
gaps.notes: Per-owner temporal buffers required.

gaps.title: Port 4 complex effects (PixelSort, FluidDistortion, Microscope, WireframeDepth)
gaps.notes: PixelSort, Microscope, WireframeDepth, Transform ported. BlobTracking ported with FFI (manifold-native crate). FluidDistortion still missing (removed from dropdown).

gaps.title: Complete sync controllers (Link, MidiClock, OSC)
gaps.notes: LinkSync: SyncTransportFromLink ported, Update body complete (native FFI stubbed). MidiClockSync: full Update state machine ported, SyncPositionToPlayback + ResetTransportTimeIntegrator ported (native FFI stubbed). OscSyncController: fully ported with SMPTE timecode parsing, transport sync, seek logic. OscReceiver: fully ported with subscription model. OscParameterRegistry: fully ported with singleton pattern. Remaining: 4 OSC bridge classes (~466 lines Unity: MasterEffectOscBridge 109L, LayerEffectOscBridge 102L, LayerOscBridge 148L, GeneratorOscBridge 107L). All registries + infrastructure in place. Bridge closures need Rust-specific buffer-and-apply pattern (can't mutate Project from inside Mutex callback). Blocked by: no live OSC receiver — bridges would be dead code until UDP listener is wired. Native FFI for AbletonLink/midir also pending.

gaps.title: ComputeCompositor fast path
gaps.notes: Single-pass compute compositor batches up to 8 effect-free layers. Performance optimization.

gaps.title: Port remaining ~40 missing methods across core structs
gaps.notes: 80+ methods added: EffectInstance (13 methods + ParamSource impl), GeneratorParamState (13 methods), ParameterDriver (constructor + BeatDivision methods), ParamEnvelope (2 constructors), TimelineClip (5 methods), Layer (8 methods), Timeline (7 methods), ProjectSettings (19 methods), RecordingProvenance (13 methods), PercussionImportState (ensure_valid), VideoLibrary (5 methods), MidiNoteParser (new module). EffectDefinitionRegistry + GeneratorDefinitionRegistry + EffectCategoryRegistry as new modules.

gaps.title: VideoExporter
gaps.notes: 1,275 lines. FFmpeg subprocess, GPU readback, Metal encoding, HDR export, audio muxing.

gaps.title: Fix ParameterDriver random hash to match Unity's algorithm
gaps.notes: Fixed: Random waveform now uses Unity's 3-round mixing hash (HashToFloat). Also fixed tempo.rs get_bpm_at_beat initial value, negative beat/seconds handling, and quantize_time_seconds sentinel preservation.

gaps.title: Port IExternalOutput trait + ExternalOutputType + LEDConstants + LedSettings
gaps.notes: Type definitions and constants for LED output subsystem.

gaps.title: Port ArtNetDmxConverter + ArtNetOutput + LEDOutputController
gaps.notes: Full pipeline: compositor blit, GPU readback, DMX pack, UDP send.

gaps.title: Port external monitor output (second winit window + wgpu surface)
gaps.notes: NativeMonitorWindowController.cs (574 lines). HDR logic (EDR headroom, PQ decode) worth preserving.

gaps.title: Port DiagnosticsDB + PerfRollupAccumulator + CreativeSnapshotBuilder
gaps.notes: 1,417 lines across 4 files. SQLite telemetry. Not needed for visual/behavioral parity.

gaps.title: VideoLibrary disk-scanning methods (ScanDirectory, ScanLayerFolder, ProcessVideoFile)
gaps.notes: VideoLibrary struct exists with add/remove/find/clear methods, but the filesystem scanning methods that rebuild the library from disk are missing. Unity: VideoLibrary.cs ScanDirectory(), ScanLayerFolder(), ProcessVideoFile().

gaps.title: Fix 5 minor core behavioral divergences
gaps.notes: All 5 verified: (1) seconds_per_beat_from_bpm — already had clamp(20,300). (2) overlaps_with — FIXED: added layer_index guard matching Unity. (3) ensure_base_values — already checks is_none OR length mismatch. (4) change_generator_type — FIXED: added LayerType::Generator guard + update_clip_generator_types() propagation; also fixed restore_generator_state. (5) BeatQuantizer negative sentinel — already fixed (negative values returned as-is).
